Griffin_1 = {
	name = The_Griffin_King # Canon, last of the mountain kings, defeated by The Winged Knight
	dynasty = dynn_Griffin

	prowess = 20

	religion = old_gods_wnw
	culture = moon_clan

	trait = education_martial_2
	trait = education_martial_prowess_4
	trait = brave
	trait = arrogant
	trait = impatient
	trait = bossy

	disallow_random_traits = yes

	2949.1.1 = {
		birth = yes
		add_character_flag = canon_status_canon
	}
	3000.1.1 = {
		death = {
			death_reason = death_duel
			killer = Winged_Knight_1 # Artys the Winged Knight
		}
	}
}

			value = 100
		}
	}
	8204.1.1 = {
		add_spouse = Beesbury_45 # Janna Beesbury
		effect = {
			if = {
				limit = { character:Beesbury_46 = { is_alive = yes } }
				set_relation_friend = character:Beesbury_46 # Humfrey Beesbury
			}
		}
	}
	8209.2.1 = {
		trait = maimed
		death = {
			death_reason = death_duel_trial_by_seven # Duncan the Tall's Trial by Seven

		}
	}
